title: Unstable Falling Blocks
description: Makes unstable falling blocks have a separate texture.
body:
This pack very subtly changes the texture of naturally-generating falling blocks that do not have supporting blocks beneath them.

If you want something more obvious, try [Obvious Unstable Falling Blocks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/obvious-unstable-falling-blocks)!

![All textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65fd6ba3a6ede38f66269fcd9d0e9f65ebc74372.png)

This pack is inspired by [Ensis](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/floating-blocks-5671464/) and [ManuelXXVI](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xxvi-s-unstable-blocks/), though my block model is set up a bit differently than theirs to make the effect as seamless as possible.
